allow: Bash(powershell -Command 'Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $inFile = '\\''C:/Users/LifeProfessor/.claude/projects/D--Programming-study-afterschool-promotion/30fa4666-7a3d-4ae5-822d-6a666573b9b4/tool-results/webfetch-1776492850742-ma325n.bin'\\''; $outFile = '\\''C:/Users/LifeProfessor/.claude/projects/D--Programming-study-afterschool-promotion/30fa4666-7a3d-4ae5-822d-6a666573b9b4/tool-results/design_decoded.html'\\''; $input = [System.IO.File]::OpenRead\($inFile\); $gz = New-Object System.IO.Compression.GZipStream\($input, [System.IO.Compression.CompressionMode]::Decompress\); $output = [System.IO.File]::Create\($outFile\); $gz.CopyTo\($output\); $gz.Close\(\); $input.Close\(\); $output.Close\(\); Write-Host Done')
